QW-250  WELDING VARIABLES — PROCEDURE SPECIFICATIONS. (a) The essential variables for each welding process shall be as required by the tables of this paragraph. A change in an essential variable requires requalification in accordance with QW-200 and QW-202. (b) Nonessential variables may be changed without requalification, unless exempted by the referencing Code. (c) Supplementary essential variables become essential when applicable for impact testing. For performance qualification variables, see QW-350. Essential variables include changes to base metal group per QW-403, filler metal per QW-404, and thickness range subject to QW-451. See also QW-280 for special process variables.
